title: HUD (disambiguation)
content:
The word "hud" can refer to:

==[[Canon]]==
*"HUD," acronym for [[Heads-up display]]

==[[Star Wars Legends|Legends]]==
*[[Hud]], a creature native to the planet [[Rutan/Legends|Rutan]]
*"HUD," acronym for [[Heads-up display/Legends|Heads-up display]]

{{Disambig}}
